problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression
hypothesis: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of mRNA. mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
